sections.content: Let me check the current state to see if the character is now overlapping with the green rectangle.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current objects:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['id'] == 0: continue
    b = node['boundary']
    min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_row = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=[{min_row},{min_col}]-[{max_row},{max_col}]")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTop bar: {ascii_lines[0][15:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
